character.name: Dark Cat Companion
character.prompt: Dark fantasy cat, ash grey fur with dark brown markings, one ear partially torn, left eye amber yellow, right eye milky white blind, thin leather collar with cracked rune pendant, lean underfed body, tail tip wrapped in dirty bandage, sitting pose, cold unimpressed expression. Berserk dark souls aesthetic. Palette: #3a3a3a #5c5c5c #c8a84b #ffffff #1a1a1a. Gritty, no cute elements.
